Why families switch to us

Proof, not promises

Traceable to the field

The farmer's name, village and harvest date on every pack. Ask, and we'll show you the exact field — on video or in person.

Weeks fresh, not months old

Ours travel a few kilometres from mill to kitchen — fresh dal genuinely cooks faster and tastes sweeter.

Fairer price than big brands

No distributors, no listing fees, no ad budgets in the MRP. We pass that straight back to you.

No app. No cart. Just WhatsApp.
